Featured Categories

Mailer options for standard stock and branded packaging

We built the product range around sizes and finishes that fit real packing lines. Whether you need compact padded envelopes or larger shipping mailers, the site covers standard options and custom projects for business buyers.

Request Bulk Pricing

Send your size, quantity, and product interest. We will reply with pricing and supply guidance for your shipment program.

Fast quote response Bulk order support Artwork upload available

We respond within 1-2 hours.

Prefer direct contact? Email Info@shopbubblemailers.com or call (503) 358-0443.

If you attach artwork, we will include the filename in your request and you can send the file directly by email if needed.

Why Choose Shop Bubble Mailers

Built for packaging buyers, warehouse teams, and growing brands

Bulk order support for repeat supply, seasonal projects, and high-volume packing needs.

Custom sizes and print programs for businesses that need mailers matched to their products.

Strong padded protection that helps reduce scuffs, pressure marks, and transit handling damage.

Clean sealing for quick packout and a more consistent shipping appearance.

Lightweight shipping support to help keep parcel weight lower than box-based packing.

USA-focused service with practical lead-time discussion and fast quote response.

Size Guide

Common bubble mailer sizes for everyday shipping

The right size depends on product dimensions, insert thickness, and the shipping presentation your brand wants to keep. These common formats cover many everyday use cases.

SizeTypical UseWhy Buyers Use It
4x6Small parts, jewelry cards, samplesCompact padded mailer for low-profile items
4x7Small accessories, cosmetics, cablesEasy fit for lightweight branded shipments
7x9Apparel accessories, books, boxed kitsBalanced option for everyday eCommerce orders
8.5x12Documents, notebooks, beauty setsCommon padded size for growing stores
10.5x15Folded garments, larger kits, catalogsUseful when products need more face size
12x12Square products, prints, flat boxed itemsWide opening for awkward product shapes
12x15Bulk apparel, books, large retail ordersLarge mailer for higher-volume shipments
Industries Served

Used by a wide range of shipping and retail businesses

eCommerce brandsClothing storesCosmetics brandsJewelry sellersBook sellersSmall businessesSubscription box brands
Custom Printing

Custom mailers for logo-driven packaging programs

Brands often want more than a plain shipping envelope. We support requests for logo printed bubble mailers, kraft mailers, colored mailers, and branded packaging layouts that help shipments look consistent from warehouse to doorstep.

Custom projects can be planned around standard sizes or a more specific packaging program. If you already have artwork, the quote form includes an upload field so we can review the layout requirements early.

Custom Bubble Mailers Request Bulk Pricing

Custom Print Custom Sizes Bulk Orders
  • Logo printing

    Clean brand placement for direct-to-consumer and retail shipping.

  • Size planning

    Choose standard sizes or discuss custom dimensions around your products.

  • Bulk production

    Built for repeat stock programs, launches, and seasonal order peaks.

Questions

Frequently asked questions

We supply kraft bubble mailers, white bubble mailers, padded mailing envelopes, bubble mailer bags, and custom printed mailers for brands and distributors in the USA.

Yes. Bulk pricing is available for businesses that need recurring stock, project-based quantities, or container-style volume planning. Quote pricing is adjusted around size, material, print needs, and order count.

Yes. We support custom bubble mailers with logo printing, branded colors, and print layouts for brands that want a cleaner shipping presentation.

Yes. We work with small businesses, growing online stores, subscription programs, retail brands, and established distributors.

That depends on the item dimensions, the protection level you need, and whether the shipment includes folded goods or rigid inserts. Our quote team can help narrow the best size for your application.

Yes. Bubble mailers are a practical choice when businesses want padded protection without the weight and shipping cost of corrugated cartons.

Yes. We offer both plain and kraft-style bubble mailers, along with white mailers and custom branded options.

Yes. You can contact us for a quote and discuss sample availability, production details, and size guidance before moving into a larger order.

We aim to respond quickly with practical information about size, quantity, printing options, and lead time so buyers can move forward without delay.

Yes. Shop Bubble Mailers serves businesses throughout the USA and supports orders for local operations, regional distributors, and national shipping programs.
